chunks.text_preview: Kurt Tucholsky (; 9 January 1890 – 21 December 1935 ) was a German - Jewish joumalist , satirist , and writer . He also wrote under the pseudonyms Kaspar Hauser ( after the historical figure ) , Peter Panter , Theobald Tiger and Ignaz Wrobel . Born in Berlin - Moabit , he moved to Paris in 1924 and
